description: Structured output each Stage-3 map subagent returns for ONE chunk packet. Cite timestamps (evidence_ts) from the packet; do not speculate beyond the provided text.

window_range.description: the lo..hi date range of this packet

what.description: the approach in one sentence (e.g. 'gate F2 retrieval on author shape_id')

evidence_ts.description: timestamp(s) from the packet supporting this

description.description: what went wrong, in the team's own terms

tenet_violated.description: the named tenet if identifiable (e.g. 'don't tune constants', 'prove primitive first'), else empty

human_pushback.description: true if a human correction in the packet flagged this

items.description: a direction change in this window (from X to Y, and why)
alternatives raised but not executed in this window
